entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop (Cajanus cajan L.) used in the field experiment

entities.name: BIO-PESTICIDES
entities.description: Biological agents used as an alternative to toxic insecticides to control pests

entities.name: NATURAL ENEMIES
entities.description: Beneficial organisms that prey on or parasitize pests in the pigeonpea crop

entities.name: ICRISAT HYDERABAD
entities.description: The site where the field experiment was conducted

entities.name: POD BORERS
entities.description: Pests that attack the pods of pigeonpea

entities.name: INSECTICIDE
entities.description: Chemical agents used to control pod borers, which can lead to resistance and residues

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The development of immunity or reduced sensitivity to insecticides by pests

entities.name: RESIDUE IN GRAIN
entities.description: The presence of chemical insecticide remnants in the harvested pigeonpea grains
